name: Henry 24x44 RV Garage Shed Plan - Spacious Barn Style RV Storage & Workshop
open_features: A generous footprint designed to comfortably house large RVs, campers, trailers, boats, and multiple vehicles with additional room for storage and workspace.
Large wood-style barn doors provide wide access for oversized vehicles while adding classic farmhouse character.
Tall Gable Roof for Interior Height
The high gable roof creates excellent vertical clearance, improves water runoff, and delivers the timeless look of a modern barn-style structure.
Vertical wood siding paired with a brick wainscot base detail adds durability and architectural charm.
description_summary: Upgrade your property with the Henry RV Garage Shed - a generous 24x44 storage and workshop structure designed for durability, functionality, and timeless barn-inspired design. Featuring a tall gable roof, warm vertical wood siding, rustic barn-style garage doors, and a durable brick wainscot base, Henry blends classic workshop architecture with practical modern functionality. The spacious 24x44 footprint provides ample interior room for RVs, motorhomes, boats, trailers, trucks, or a full wor...
